headline: 3 Services Stocks That Concern Us
summary: Business services providers play a critical role for enterprises, assisting them with everything from new hardware integrations to consulting and marketing. Still, investors are uneasy as firms face challenges from AI-driven disruptors and tightening corporate budgets. These doubts have caused the industry to lag recently as services stocks have collectively shed 5.2% over the past six months. This drawdown was worse than the S&P 500’s 2.1% decline.
